title: The Numbers Collapse
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy. The core beat is the numbers collapse.
scene: The scene follows the numbers collapse, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Now, this is more like it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Jahahahah hahaha hahahaha hahah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two greatest threats to my revolution, both captured in one fell blow!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is this some kind of beautiful dream?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I... I must offer my sincerest apologies!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is all my fault... If I had not fallen for their trickery, you would not have been captures ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do not apologise. What's done is done!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: "Ah... why, this isn't actually father at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Of course it isn't!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought you might show your face, jinbe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know, I admired you back in the days when you still had guts...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's happened to you, hody ....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You look completely different from when we saw you just now ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's Boss Jinbe!!! But I thought he'd left the island after he resigned from the Shichibukai .....?!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: I thought Princess Shirahoshii had been kidnapped by straw hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Boss jinbe rescue her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jahahah... well, I think that's everyone present and accounted for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This task was easier than I expected...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only unpredictable factor remaining is the straw hat pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I daresay they will be hopelessly searching for a way into the palace about now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and when they do come after me to avenge their crewmates' deaths, we will be ready to strike them down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZAZAZA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the human slaves whom I have captured over the past month

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: thirty thousand of them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZAZA -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZAZA - I'm not sure if you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZAZA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: EH?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who are all those people?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: armed fishermen, ready to fight in my name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Seventy thousand of them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In all, I have brought into this country from the fish-man district...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah..hhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...a full one hundred thousand outlaws!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are also a number of women and children who cannot fight outside the plaza...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can wait until things have settled down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Naturally, the number of human slaves will only increase as time goes on...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but for the moment, we have a hundred thousand new citizens !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The homes of you traitors to your own kind will now belong to them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I suggest you make your decision quickly... Flee, or be killed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: causing a big ruckus like this in a public plaza... you boys have no class!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop getting so carried away with yourself, Holy Jones!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that's a face I haven't seen in a while...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What do you want...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Madame Shirley !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, I just wanted to give you fair warning, that's all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Madame Shirley ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... I had a premonition, you see. Of a certain man bringing about the destruction of fish-man Island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I guess destroying the old fish-man island is exactly what I'm doing. You saw my face in this vision, did you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I did not.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The man who will destroy this island...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: ...is straw hat Luffy ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are you trying to say?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am merely telling you what I know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is he who will tear the island down, not you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O... of course!! The Madame's Predictions are never wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If straw hat Luffy is really going to destroy the island... then hody's plan to turn it into his own kingdom is doomed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ungh HH!!!!

summary: The Numbers Collapse. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
